name: The Art of Not Forgetting
summary: arXiv:2607.17944v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce CMP (Cognitive Memory Primitive), an architecture that represents inputs as sparse relational codes, stores them in a two-tier competi...
description: arXiv:2607.17944v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce CMP (Cognitive Memory Primitive), an architecture that represents inputs as sparse relational codes, stores them in a two-tier competitive memory, and learns entirely through local, gradient-free updates, with no backpropagation anywhere in the network. We use this architecture to test a specific hypothesis: that catastrophic forget...
author: Ashmith Atmuri, Akshay Kumar, Yashaswini Rao Bhogarajula
